indicators.name: L-shaped desk with dual monitors
indicators.rationale: The desk provides a large workspace suitable for dual monitors, though it lacks a dedicated chair.

indicators.name: ergonomic mesh office chairs
indicators.rationale: The chairs are ergonomic and provide lumbar support, which is beneficial for long periods of computer work.

indicators.name: task lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is directed towards the work area, reducing eye strain and providing adequate illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: closed office layout
indicators.rationale: The layout appears to be designed for focused work, with minimal distractions.

indicators.name: no personal flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height, which is necessary for setting up a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). While it has some positive aspects such as ergonomic chairs and task lighting, the absence of a flat personal work surface and the closed office layout without a dedicated desk are significant drawbacks. The layout is designed for focused work, but the lack of a flat surface hinders the ability to set up a computer workstation.
